name: OvenMediaEngine
description: OvenMediaEngine — OSS streaming server with LL-HLS, LL-DASH, and WebRTC

seo.title: OvenMediaEngine — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: OvenMediaEngine: OvenMediaEngine — OSS streaming server with LL-HLS, LL-DASH, and WebRTC

when_to_use: Open-source streaming server with LL-HLS and WebRTC support
Sub-3s latency streaming with LL-DASH and CMAF packaging
Self-hosted streaming origin without managed service costs
SRT ingest from encoders to WebRTC delivery via OvenMediaEngine
Low-latency streaming alternative to AWS MediaLive

pros: OSS LL-HLS and LL-DASH out of the box
No license fees for commercial use
cons: You operate, scale, and monitor it yourself
Thinner ecosystem than SRS or nginx-rtmp
review.verdict: Promising OSS low-latency streaming server — you save on licensing, you pay in ops.
review.best_for: Engineering teams self-hosting low-latency streaming on commodity infra.
review.not_for: Teams wanting managed SaaS or enterprise SLAs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
